3215200.name: Pumpkin Clicker
3215200.description:
Pumpkin Clicker is a game about making as many pumpkins as you can, and then some more! To help you in this endeavor you will recruit the help of different items and upgrades like seeds, fertilizer, helpers, and harvesters!

Pumpkin Clicker is an indie game developed by a single developer. I am actively developing the game and it will continue to receive updates over time. Try it out and see all the features!

- Collect pumpkins and spend them to earn even more pumpkins
- Upgrade your items to reach your true pumpkin-producing potential
- Check your stats to see how many pumpkins you've earned since the beginning of time
